response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong general software engineering capabilities and infrastructure expertise, this role requires highly specialized embedded security expertise that is absent from the resume. Most critically, the required native-level Japanese language proficiency is not mentioned, making the candidate ineligible for this position. Additionally, the candidate's recent career trajectory (past 7+ years) has moved away from C/embedded systems toward web/Node.js development, and there is no demonstrated expertise in security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X), firmware development, or networking technologies essential for this embedded LAN-switch security role.
strengths: Extensive multi-language programming experience with demonstrated software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, infrastructure automation)
Some embedded systems exposure through robotic arm development and low-latency distributed systems work
Strong Linux and infrastructure foundation with DevOps expertise in CI/CD pipelines and container orchestration
concerns: Missing required native-level Japanese language proficiency with no Japanese skills listed in resume
No demonstrated security domain expertise (no mention of encryption, authentication systems, MACsec, 802.1X, tamper detection, or security protocols)
Career trajectory away from embedded/C development; last C/C++ work was 2014-2015; past 7 years focused on web/TypeScript/Node.js

key_factors.factor: No security expertise or networking protocols knowledge
Outdated C/embedded systems experience; recent focus on web technologies
